form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.57) when fourth over 390m at Ballarat in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and six places from 18 starts. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Could manage only seventh last time but turned heads the start prior when she clocked a slick 22.72 over 400m finishing second at this track. Expected to go close with a repeat.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 4 lengths at this track over 400m (23.01) beating Pay Up Sally in Grade 5 on April 9. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.
